Discussion
OCT4 is a crucial transcription factor with a key
role in maintaining the stemness state of pluripo-
tent cells (8, 13, 23, 24). It was initially believed
that OCT4 is exclusively expressed in embryonic
stem cells, however, its recent detection in some
